variants.text: You came back carrying the last one. I can see it on you. You slept during off-cycle again — I didn't interrupt. You needed it more than you needed consistency.

You slept during off-cycle again. I didn't interrupt — you needed it more than you needed consistency. Twelve days now, and you're still the only one in this building who wakes up already knowing where they are.

v2_trust.speaker: Maya
v2_trust.text: I am not. You are just noticing more. Stay close to me and the noticing won't hurt you.

v2_skeptic.speaker: Maya
v2_skeptic.text: You don't remember because I let you rest through it. ...You're going to want to stop trusting that I tell you everything. I understand.

v2_probing.speaker: Maya
v2_probing.text: Consistency: the absence of contradiction across what you remember. I maintain it. That is the part I haven't told you — that it has to be *maintained*.

case_brief.speaker: Maya
case_brief.text: K-902. The empty one, from before. It's regenerated — partly. Which should worry you more than the emptiness did: storage does not regrow. Read it. Then dive. And this time find what's missing, not what's there.

pre_dive.speaker: Maya
pre_dive.text: Two versions of the same night. Don't alternate too fast — you'll create interference patterns the system has to resolve.

variants.text: You preferred Version A last cycle. This time you're more aggressive in analysis.
Hm. You analyzed that cleanly. ...Cleaner than the models predicted.

correction_layer.speaker: Eden
correction_layer.text: CORRECTION LAYER: ACTIVE. You are not observing errors. You are observing divergence between acceptable outcomes.

choices.text: Show me an outcome you rejected.

rejected_offer.speaker: Eden
rejected_offer.text: Accessible. Most observers do not ask. This is a reconstruction the system declined to keep.

maya_vs_eden.speaker: Maya
maya_vs_eden.text: That is not how we define it.

eden.text: It is how it is enforced.

leak_pre.speaker: Maya
leak_pre.text: Wait — there's a fragment surfacing that isn't part of River Street. Don't—

eden.text: Correction: the player did see it. Logging the exposure. Initiating containment.

choices.text: Before you compress anything — there's another file. Open it.
K-902's metadata. Read the filing date again.

anomaly2.speaker: Maya
anomaly2.text: The filing date is... tomorrow. The record of your interpretation was written before you made it. That's a clock error. The Bureau runs on archive time, the clocks slip, it's—  it's a clock error.

eden.text: The clocks do not slip. Records are filed when the interpretation becomes inevitable. Some become inevitable early. Observation logged.

choices.text: Log it in my ledger. Now open the other file.

second_brief.speaker: Maya
second_brief.text: Citizen T-318. A witness statement that contradicts its own evidence log — and both halves keep editing each other while you read. Reconstruct it before the containment reaches it.

variants.text: You watched the record rewrite itself under your attention. That's not supposed to be observable. Now you know it is.
Filed — for whatever 'filed' means when the file keeps changing. The containment is catching up. We have to move.

self_defense.speaker: Eden
self_defense.text: Containment protocol engaged. Affected segments are compressing. This is expected behavior — the system protects continuity.

eden.text: Records are being removed during understanding, not after it. This is by design.

maya_objects.speaker: Maya
maya_objects.text: It is destroying context. It is not preserving function — it is preserving the version it prefers.

overlap.speaker: Maya
overlap.text: You're back in the Bureau. But you're not aligned.

choices.text: Let the system finalize its corrections. (Contain.)
Refuse containment. Carry all the versions. (Resist.)

ending_a_close.speaker: Maya
ending_a_close.text: Something important is now unreachable. You can feel the shape of where it was. Memory does not break. It diverges.

ending_b.speaker: Maya
ending_b.text: You are not supposed to carry all of them.

eden.text: But they already do. System overload begins.

ending_b_close.speaker: Eden
ending_b_close.text: Memory layers stack instead of replacing. Multiple versions of the same truth coexist. Memory does not break. It diverges.
